# StudyHub

> StudyHub™ is a student-only social network and discussion community focused on school life, questions, and studying. It is NOT a tutoring service, homework-answer site, or paid education company.

StudyHub is a community-driven social platform for students aged 13+. It functions like a peer community (closer to Reddit or Discord for students) rather than a tutoring business. Members ask questions to other students, join study squads (groups), share notes, track tasks and calendars, collaborate on whiteboards and docs, and use Nova, a built-in AI study companion. The platform also includes life-transition learning modules to help students prepare for adulthood. There are no paid human tutors, no tutoring sessions, and no homework-for-hire service.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of StudyHub and entry point for new students.
- [Feed](/feed): Community feed of student posts and discussions.
- [Questions](/questions): Q&A hub where students post and answer school questions.
- [Tasks](/tasks): Personal task manager with calendar and kanban views.
- [Calendar](/calendar): Schedule events and deadlines, with optional Google Calendar sync.
- [Notes](/notes): Rich note-taking with LaTeX, code blocks, mentions, and AI assist.
- [Whiteboards](/whiteboards): Real-time collaborative whiteboards.
- [Study Tools](/study): Flashcards, quizzes, mind maps, and Pomodoro timer.
- [AI Study Tools](/content-generator): Generate study content from trusted sources.
- [Nova AI Assistant](/assistant): Conversational AI study companion for students (not a paid tutor).
- [Friends](/friends): Find and connect with other students.
- [Groups](/groups): Browse and join study groups (Study Squads).
- [Leaderboard](/leaderboard): Community ranking based on activity and achievements.
- [Saved Posts](/saved): Posts the user has bookmarked.
- [Updates](/updates): Official announcements and product updates.
- [Transitions](/transitions): Life-skills modules for the transition from school to adulthood.
- [Install App](/install): Instructions to install StudyHub as a PWA.
- [Support](/support): Help center and contact for support requests.
- [Sign In](/auth): Account sign-in and registration.

## Optional

- [Terms of Service](/terms): Legal terms of use.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How user data is handled.
